# `aube diag compare`

- **Usage**: `aube diag compare [--min-delta-ms <MIN_DELTA_MS>] [--min-pct <MIN_PCT>] <A> <B>`

Diff two diag JSONL traces and surface per-operation regressions

## Arguments

### `<A>`

Baseline trace

### `<B>`

Comparison trace

## Flags

### `--min-delta-ms <MIN_DELTA_MS>`

Minimum |Δsum_ms| to surface (default 50)

**Default:** `50`

### `--min-pct <MIN_PCT>`

Minimum |%change| to surface (default 10)

**Default:** `10`
